proposed_relations.description: 34th St SBS fare pre-payment claim: fare evasion declined on Bx12 and M15

evidence_refs.source_quote: Fare evasion on Bx12 SBS and M15 SBS declined after pre-payment introduced

rationale: Claim about fare evasion cited in 34th Street SBS fare pre-payment enforcement slide.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Fare evasion on Bx12 SBS and M15 SBS declined after pre-payment introduced

quarantine.note: The claim is about fare evasion declining on Bx12 SBS and M15 SBS — entirely different routes from 34th Street SBS. The cited block text ('Fare evasion on Bx12 SBS and M15 SBS declined after pre-payment introduced') states a fact about other SBS routes and never mentions 34th Street or the 34th Street SBS project. Co-occurrence in a 34th Street SBS slide deck does not establish that this claim belongs to the 34th Street SBS project; the block text does not state a connection between the two records.
